steps.title: Choose two points
steps.content: The line of best fit falls from left to right, so the slope must be negative. Two visible points on the drawn line are approximately $(0{,}11.2)$ and $(8{,}4.5)$.

steps.title: Calculate the slope
steps.content: Use the slope formula: $$ m=\frac{4.5-11.2}{8-0}=\frac{-6.7}{8}=-0.8375 $$ This is closest to $-0.84$. The answer is B.
